name: @borjie/anomaly-detection
description: SOTA real-time + batch anomaly detection for Mr. Mwikila's mining operations. Score-based detectors (Isolation Forest, LOF, One-Class SVM port, autoencoder port), threshold detectors (z-score, MAD), drift detectors (ADWIN, KSWIN, Page-Hinkley), online stream wrapper, voting ensembles, mining-domain wrappers (fuel consumption, weight bridge, worker check-in, royalty filing, equipment vibration), and a tenant-scoped hash-chained verdict repository. Pure TypeScript; Python sidecars (OC-SVM, autoencoder) behind ports. Companion to Docs/DESIGN/ANOMALY_DETECTION_SOTA_2026.md.
